headline: Built for ScaleWise
subheadline: AI infrastructure to optimize talent acquisition and service delivery for scaling Australian SMEs

challenges.title: Talent Shortages
challenges.desc: ScaleWise's small team of 3 struggles to hire specialists quickly for client projects. This limits their ability to support rapid SME growth. Efficient recruitment tools are essential to maintain service quality.

challenges.title: Risk Management
challenges.desc: As a consulting firm, ScaleWise must minimize risks for early-stage businesses but lacks resources for thorough analysis. This can lead to overlooked issues in scaling operations. A structured approach is needed to ensure sustainable client outcomes.

challenges.title: Service Scalability
challenges.desc: With only 3 employees, ScaleWise faces challenges in delivering tailored advice to multiple SMEs simultaneously. This bottlenecks their holistic methodology and impacts client satisfaction. Streamlined processes are vital for handling increased demand.

challenges.title: Growth Tracking
challenges.desc: ScaleWise helps SMEs scale but struggles to track their own internal metrics effectively. This makes it hard to measure success in professionalizing governance. Better data tools would align their operations with client needs.

deliverables.title: AI Talent Platform
deliverables.desc: Builds an AI system for automated candidate screening and hiring, integrating with ScaleWise's GTM solutions to speed up talent acquisition

deliverables.title: Risk Assessment Tool
deliverables.desc: Creates an AI-driven tool for identifying business risks, integrating with their consulting methodology to provide real-time insights for clients

deliverables.title: Service Delivery System
deliverables.desc: Develops an AI infrastructure for efficient project management and delivery, linking with existing GTM diagnostics to enhance SME support

deliverables.title: Growth Analytics Dashboard
deliverables.desc: Constructs a dashboard for tracking business metrics, integrating with ScaleWise's operations to monitor employee growth and client outcomes

engagementSteps.title: Assessment Phase
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 1
engagementSteps.desc: Review ScaleWise's current talent and delivery processes based on research data

engagementSteps.title: Design Phase
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 2
engagementSteps.desc: Develop AI prototypes tailored to their SME scaling needs

engagementSteps.title: Implementation Phase
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 3
engagementSteps.desc: Integrate the new systems and train the team on usage

faqItems.question: What is AI-powered sales infrastructure?
faqItems.answer: It's a system that uses AI to streamline talent and delivery processes for consulting firms like ScaleWise.

faqItems.question: How does it integrate with our business?
faqItems.answer: The infrastructure links with your GTM solutions to enhance efficiency in supporting SMEs.

faqItems.question: Is this customized for us?
faqItems.answer: Yes, it's built specifically for ScaleWise's focus on Australian SME scaling.

faqItems.question: What are the costs involved?
faqItems.answer: Costs depend on your needs, starting from affordable options based on your firm size.

faqItems.question: How long does implementation take?
faqItems.answer: Typically 3 months, as outlined in our engagement steps.

faqItems.question: Can it scale with our growth?
faqItems.answer: Yes, the AI tools are designed to adapt as your team and clients expand.

stackItems.name: Slack
stackItems.role: Facilitates team communication for small consulting teams

stackItems.name: Google Workspace
stackItems.role: Handles document collaboration and productivity tools

stackItems.name: OpenAI
stackItems.role: Powers AI features for talent screening and risk analysis

stackItems.name: HubSpot
stackItems.role: Manages GTM diagnostics and client interactions

stackItems.name: Asana
stackItems.role: Tracks project delivery and internal workflows
